title: Product sync — 2026-02-10
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-02-10
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- BlueOrbit Media escalated User Management & SSO problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'SSO/SAML support' across accounts.
- Eng notes User Management & SSO generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'SSO/SAML support' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate User Management & SSO performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with BlueOrbit Media.
